ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( Rec_Type_Name__c = "Renewal", PRIORVALUE(Rec_Type_Name__c) <> "Renewal" ), AND( Rec_Type_Name__c <> "Renewal", PRIORVALUE(Rec_Type_Name__c) = "Renewal" ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type, "Renewal"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Type), "Renewal")) ), AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Renewal")), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Type), "Renewal") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Renewal Opportunity is restricted. Please contact Deal Desk
